title: Zero blisters
review_text: Three months of daily running and not a single blister. Seamless toe is the key. Merino wool keeps feet cool in summer and warm in winter. Best running socks.

title: Left right fit is legit
review_text: The anatomical left/right fit is noticeable and makes a difference. Arch compression band feels supportive without being tight. Great value for a 3-pack.
